properties.body:
SEA OF MARMARA.
1. CABLE OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE
   BY CABLESHIP RAYMOND CROZE:
   A. IN AREA BOUND BY
      40-40.15N 027-14.70E, 40-31.18N 027-08.98E
      40-33.03N 027-24.39E, 40-41.70N 027-28.10E.
   B. WITHIN 2.5 MILES OF 40-53.45N 028-50.14E.
   C. WITHIN TWO MILES OF 40-46.70N 028-08.37E.
   WIDE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 1567/11.
